required_preferences.fact: Adopts a self-guided at-home flexibility and stress management routine using video classes, since the studio is closed for renovations

supersedes.fact: Temporarily skips her weekly yoga class as per doctor's orders; focusing on prescribed gentle stretches at home instead

required_preferences.fact: Avoids lifting any boxes herself, regardless of weight — all lifting delegated to staff for now

supersedes.fact: Refuses to lift boxes heavier than 25 pounds; asks staff for help with anything heavier

required_preferences.fact: Sets her phone to Do Not Disturb after 8pm every night, no exceptions
Reviews all new product listings and images for potential copyright issues before posting to the online store, rather than assuming vendor-provided content is safe
Uses a lumbar support cushion whenever she's working at the register — never stands without it
Uses Pinterest to save new decorating ideas, never relies solely on Instagram feeds

persona: A small business owner with limited legal training handling vendor contracts
